\tzpentry{ID5748}{Gyromagnetic Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5748 introduces Gyromagnetic Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \boldsymbol{\Omega}_{LT} = \frac{\mu_0 I_{gyro}\boldsymbol{\omega}_{gyro}}{4\pi r^3} \end{equation}
